examples: John, hightail down to the station and see if your daddy's on the train.
Or an escape route? before returning home to fleece my husband of the marital assets, and hightail it back to Manly beach with Brad, the surf instructor.
Hightail it out of there with your kids in tow, most immediately.
We split the outbound trip across parts of three days, whereas we hightail it back home at the end.
